calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Petitioner Elena Porsina was present in pro per for self and as guardian ad litem for the minor Xenia Porsina, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
Declaration by the minor's father Serghei Porsin consented to the name change of the minor was presented in open court.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Ellen Porshe and for the change of name of the minor to Xenia Porshe.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Reset To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Petitioner Elena Porsina was present in pro per on behalf of herself, and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Xenia Prosina, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannont proceed with the proposed name changes due to the fact that petitioner Elena Porsina did not provide the minor's father, Serghei Porsin, with notice of today's hearing.

Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to October 25, 2011 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 514.
